description:
DeepSeek API pricing per million tokens. Edit these values to update cost estimates without recompiling.
AI TRANSLATION NOTE: The display_name and comment fields can be translated for UI display. Pricing numbers (input_cache_hit_per_million, etc.) should remain in their original numeric form.
_ai_translation_note: Brand names (DeepSeek), product names (V4 Pro, V4 Flash), and UI labels can be translated. Keep all numeric values in their original form.
